title: Venue. Complaints shall be filed in the Regional Office having jurisdiction
content: 57 over the place where the seafarer was recruited or resides, or where the principal office 58 of the respondent manning agency or the residence of the seafarer-respondent is 59 situated, at the option of the complainant. 60 61 In case of multiple complainants, where two or more regional offices have jurisdiction over 62 51 the place where the workers were recruited or reside, or where the principal office or 1 residence of any of the respondents is situated, the venue shall be at the option of the 2 majority of the complainants. In case of disagreement, the Adjudication Bureau shall 3 determine the venue of the case. 4 5
